# Container & Enclosure Vendors for ADC 3K Pod
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## US ISO Container Manufacturers (AMERICAN MADE)

### GTI Fabrication — Buffalo, NY (TOP PICK)
- 850,000+ sq ft manufacturing
- ABS and Lloyd's Register approved
- ISO 9001:2015
- 100% US-sourced steel
- TAA and Buy American Act COMPLIANT
- Builds thousands of ISO/CSC certified containers/year
- Contact: (716) 205-1326
- gtifabrication.com
- Est. price: $12,000-25,000 per 40-ft HC

### SEA BOX, Inc. — East Riverton, NJ
- 40+ years, 650,000+ sq ft
- Model SB462.9 = 40-ft High Cube
- Military and commercial
- ISO 9001:2015
- seabox.com
- Est. price: $12,000-25,000

## Louisiana / Gulf Coast Fabricators

### Fibrebond (Eaton) — Minden, LA
- THE modular power enclosure manufacturer
- 51,000+ modules deployed, 1M+ sq ft
- $378M revenue, acquired by Eaton for $1.4B
- Builds exactly what ADC needs — pre-integrated power enclosures
- LED expansion project in Webster Parish
- Est. price: $100,000-300,000+ (enterprise, all-in)

### Cajun Industries — New Iberia, LA (30 mi from Lafayette)
- Module assembly yard at Port of Iberia
- 100+ welding procedures
- Could fabricate custom enclosures
- cajunusa.com

### Metal Shark — Jeanerette, LA (30 mi from Lafayette)
- World-class CNC/welding/design
- ALUMINUM specialist (not steel)
- Better for lightweight edge/offshore variants
- metalsharkboats.com

### Falcon Structures — Austin, TX (~500 mi)
- Container modifier specialist
- (512) 231-1010
- falconstructures.com
- Est. price: $25,000-50,000 per modified container

### BMarko Structures — Atlanta HQ, Houston presence
- Markets containerized data centers specifically
- bmarkostructures.com
- Est. price: $50,000-150,000+

### Integra Mission Critical — NEW 1.2M sq ft facility, Houston
- Purpose-built modular data center enclosures

## The Big Question: ISO Container vs Purpose-Built?

ISO containers are 8 ft wide, corrugated walls waste space, floors not designed for rack point loads. If ADC 3K pods never ride container ships, CSC certification is unnecessary overhead.

**Alternative**: Purpose-built steel enclosure to ISO EXTERNAL dimensions (40'x8'x9'6") with ISO corner castings for crane/flatbed handling. Get transport compatibility without the container constraints.

## Pricing Reality
| Option | Price |
|--------|-------|
| Chinese 40-ft HC (CIMC/Singamas) | $4,500-7,000 |
| US-made ISO (GTI/SEA BOX) | $12,000-25,000 |
| Modified for data center (Falcon) | $25,000-50,000 |
| Purpose-built modular (BMarko/Integra) | $50,000-150,000+ |
| Fibrebond/Eaton enterprise | $100,000-300,000+ |

## LED Angle
ADC pod factory (8-12 people, manual assembly) qualifies for LED FastStart (free workforce training, #1 in nation 12 years). "Building AI pods in Louisiana with American steel and Louisiana workers."

## Recommended Actions
1. RFQ to GTI Fabrication — real US-made ISO pricing
2. RFQ to SEA BOX — backup US manufacturer
3. Call Falcon Structures — modification pricing
4. Talk to Cajun Industries — local fabrication capability
5. Evaluate purpose-built vs modified ISO — if pods never ship overseas, skip CSC
6. Fibrebond (Eaton) for enterprise power enclosures at Willow Glen scale
